现在有什么 Skills 支持一键可以发布内容到推特的文章草稿啊？
https://t.co/XhJS8jKzcn

冷知识：

1.  OpenAI 计划年底扩员至 8000 人...

2.  MD ，人才太稀缺了，很多大厂跪求人才，完全招不到人才，也招不满...

而国内社交媒体却 7 x 24 小时播报海外的裁员信息-_-...

OpenAI为什么要扩员？有几个并行驱动因素：

1. $110B 融资轮刚完成，估值 $840B，SoftBank 领投，钱到位了，扩张有底气

2. 企业客户爆发：ChatGPT Enterprise 和 API 业务增长极快，需要大量销售和技术支持人员跟上

3. 模型竞争加剧：Google Gemini、Anthropic Claude、Meta Llama、中国 DeepSeek

是校招优先吗

原文没有提到校招优先，从岗位结构看**不是**。Technical Ambassadorship 这类岗位需要有企业客户经验的人，销售岗也偏社招。

研究岗会有 PhD 应届，但整体扩张以有经验的社招为主。

值得关注的背景信号

- OpenAI

今天的重磅消息，OpenAI决定不躺了，给HR定了个KPI，年底之前大幅扩招增员78%，以社招为主，技术人员为主。

一个有意思的岗位类别正在兴起 Technical Ambassadorship ，我问了一下哈吉米，它说最贴切的中文对应：阿里云/腾讯云/华为云的行业解决方案架构师，或者字节/百度大模型团队的AI

I let an AI agent run my entire sourcing and screening process.

It returned a fully qualified shortlist in under 24 hours.

Here's what actually happened: https://t.co/0GHIw2joQt

The old recruiting loop:

→ Write the brief
→ Post the job
→ Search LinkedIn for hours
→ Screen 40 calls to find 4 good candidates
→ Lose 2 weeks before presenting anyone

Every recruiter knows this grind. Most have just accepted it.

Noota Talent flips the entire sequence.

An Intake Agent aligns you with the hiring manager instantly and generates a structured scorecard.

A Sourcing Agent then searches job boards, networks, and databases 24/7 to find and enrich profiles automatically.

No manual hunting. No https://t.co/dJBFioKRk0

Then the Screening Agent runs asynchronous interviews.

Voice or text. No calendar negotiation. No 30 qualification calls.

It assesses skills, motivations, salary expectations, and generates a structured report for each candidate.

You review the output. Not the raw pile.

The numbers after running it:

→ 3 to 5x more qualified candidates processed
→ 40 to 70% less time spent on screening
→ 25 to 45% reduction in time-to-hire
→ Shortlist ready in under 24 hours

And it syncs directly to your ATS. No double entry. No missing fields.

Recruiters aren't slow. The process is.

Noota Talent gives your team the capacity to focus on what actually matters: the people, the negotiation, the relationship.

The operational work runs itself.
